name: Tinta Academy
tagline: Wine education platform with course sales and email marketing
description: Tinta Academy is a wine education platform where educators create and sell courses, and students purchase and access them. It features a complete checkout flow with MercadoPago integration, role-based dashboards for admins, educators, and students, and a built-in email campaign system with templates, workflows, and open/click tracking.
highlights: Full checkout flow with MercadoPago payment integration and webhook processing
Role-based dashboards: superadmin, educator, and student panels
Email marketing system with campaigns, templates, workflows, and tracking
Rich text course editor with Tiptap and image uploads via Vercel Blob
OTP authentication with branded email templates via Resend
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md present, feature commits suggest AI-assisted development)
